# `/camerashake` Command
Applies shaking to the players' camera with a specified intensity and duration.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/camerashake add <player: target> [intensity: float] [seconds: float] [shakeType: CameraShakeType]`

### `/camerashake stop [player: target]`

## Arguments
- `intensity`: float
- `player`: target
- `seconds`: float
- `shakeType`: CameraShakeType

## Enums
### `CameraShakeType`

#### Values
- `positional`
- `rotational`
